---
name: Pull request
about: Submit a change to LaraSkills
---

## Summary

<!-- Brief overview of what this PR does. Keep it to 1–3 sentences. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check the relevant option(s). Remove those that don't apply. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test improvement or addition
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Performance improvement

## What changed

<!-- Describe the changes in detail. List files or areas touched if helpful. -->

## Why needed

<!-- Explain the motivation for this change. Link to any related issues. -->

## Testing

<!-- Describe the tests you ran and their results. -->

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] New tests added for the change
- [ ] Existing tests unaffected

## Verification checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run benchmark` passes
- [ ] `node scripts/laraskills.mjs validate --format json --laraskills-root .` passes
- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or local paths committed
- [ ] Compatibility with Node.js 18+ checked
- [ ] Breaking changes documented (if any)

## Screenshots / output

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or relevant CLI output to help explain your change. -->

## Additional notes

<!-- Anything else reviewers should know. -->
